title: Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
company: Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates:
Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates!
